Footer.desc: With over half a century of experience, we provide the assurance of the world's most powerful brands in your heavy industry and infrastructure projects.
Footer.emailError: Please enter a valid email address.

Hero.desc: As the official distributor of Cedima, DUSS, Ticab, Victor, and GCE brands, we offer uninterrupted engineering and spare part solutions for your heavy industry, road construction, and professional drilling processes.

Pillars.title:
Zero Compromise
in Engineering.
Pillars.p1_desc: With our certified technicians reaching every point in Turkey, we provide 24/7 original spare parts and maintenance guarantee for your machines.
Pillars.p2_desc: All the global brands we represent meet European engineering standards that guarantee operator safety even in the heaviest industrial conditions.
Pillars.p3_desc: Thanks to our extensive stock network, we minimize potential downtime on-site and deliver consumables to your site as quickly as possible.
Pillars.p4_desc: We bring the production power and innovation capability of the brands we represent to your projects in Turkey with original warranty standards.

Map.title: Engineering Without Borders
Map.desc: With our Turkey-based logistics network, we export industrial machinery and spare parts to a wide geography, primarily Poland, Ukraine, Iraq, Libya, Syria, Afghanistan, and Egypt.

CatalogPage.heroDesc: You can examine all the machinery and spare parts of the global brands we represent, suitable for your project needs, and request a quote instantly.

ContactPage.desc: Contact our expert team for your projects, technical support requests, or business partnerships.

QuotePage.desc: Send us the products or solutions you need, and our sales team will get back to you with custom pricing and detailed information as soon as possible.
QuotePage.formDesc: Please fill out the fields below completely to submit your request.

BrandsPage.heroDesc: We are the authorized engineering and supply point in Turkey for pioneering international brands that set industry standards in technology and durability.
BrandsPage.formerDesc: Representations we successfully carried out in the past, adding value to Özensan's sector experience.

CareerPage.heroDesc: We continue to grow with over half a century of experience and global business partnerships. We are waiting for your application to become a part of our innovative and dynamic team.
CareerPage.formDesc: Please provide us with information about your expertise and experience by filling out the fields below. Our Human Resources team will review your resume and get back to you.

FAQPage.heroDesc: You can find answers to your questions about our services, distributorships, and after-sales processes here.
FAQPage.notfound: Couldn't find the answer you were looking for? You can contact our team for customized solutions and detailed information.

SolutionsPage.heroDesc: We offer integrated engineering solutions that meet the demanding requirements of different industries, providing high efficiency and occupational safety.
